name: Make It So
description: An SDLC control plane that puts the builder in command of an agent crew.

configPath.description: Path to the Make It So YAML configuration

numberOneAgent.description: OpenClaw agent used for initial Number 1 planning handoffs

numberOneModel.description: Strategist model used for initial Number 1 planning handoffs

numberOneThinking.description: Thinking level used for initial Number 1 planning handoffs

discordRouteAliases.description: Map friendly Discord route names such as notifications to explicit OpenClaw Discord targets

installSchedules.description: Allow the operator to install the two plugin-owned Gateway cron jobs
